evals.name: form-with-product-and-role
evals.prompt: Resolve paths for: featureName=legalRepresentatives, subFeatureName=createLegalRepresentative, featureType=form, product=hoaLoan, role=pm

evals.name: interactive-list-no-product-no-role
evals.prompt: Resolve paths for: featureName=userManagement, subFeatureName=pendingUsers, featureType=interactiveList

evals.name: inquiry-process-no-append
evals.prompt: Resolve paths for: featureName=propertyManagement, subFeatureName=details, featureType=inquiryProcess, product=hoaAccount, role=fsp

assertions.name: FeaturePath does NOT append featureType
assertions.check: Feature Path does not contain 'inquiryProcesss' or 'inquiryProcess/' after role

evals.name: kebab-case-to-camelCase
evals.prompt: Resolve paths for: featureName=hoa-loan-signature, subFeatureName=sign-documents, featureType=form, product=hoa-loan, role=pm

evals.name: modal-product-only-no-role
evals.prompt: Resolve paths for: featureName=referenceAccount, subFeatureName=confirmDelete, featureType=modal, product=hoaLoan

assertions.name: FeaturePath has no role segment
assertions.check: path goes directly from hoaLoan to modals with no role in between

evals.name: form-product-only
evals.prompt: Resolve paths for: featureName=members, subFeatureName=editProfile, featureType=form, product=hoaAccount

assertions.name: FeaturePath has product but no role before forms/

evals.name: minimal-inputs-request-type
evals.prompt: Resolve paths for: featureName=documentExchange, subFeatureName=upload, featureType=request

assertions.name: FeaturePath is just the featureName base
